business.name: Cool R Us Inc
business.tagline: Fast fixes, cool comfort, every time

hero.headline: Same-Day AC Repair & HVAC Service in *Jacksonville*
hero.subheadline: Licensed technicians, upfront pricing, and emergency service when you need it most. Get your system running in hours, not days.

services_section.label: WHAT WE DO
services_section.heading: Complete HVAC Solutions
services_section.subheading: From emergency repairs to new installations, we keep Jacksonville cool year-round

services.title: Emergency AC Repair
services.description: Same-day service for broken AC units. Our licensed technicians diagnose and fix most issues on the first visit with upfront pricing.

services.title: HVAC System Installation
services.description: Complete system replacements with energy-efficient units. Free in-home estimates and flexible financing options available.

services.title: Preventive Maintenance
services.description: Annual tune-ups to prevent breakdowns and extend system life. Scheduled maintenance plans available with priority service.

services.title: Duct Cleaning & Sealing
services.description: Improve air quality and system efficiency with professional duct services. Reduce energy bills and allergens in your home.

about.heading: Trusted HVAC Experts Since 2015
about.body: Cool R Us has been keeping Jacksonville families comfortable through Florida's toughest weather. Our team of licensed, experienced technicians provides honest service with transparent pricing. We're not just repair specialists—we're your neighbors, committed to fast solutions and long-term relationships.

reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: AC died on a 95-degree Saturday afternoon. Cool R Us had someone here within 3 hours and got it running by evening. Fair pricing and no surprise fees.

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: Replaced our 15-year-old system last month. They explained all options clearly and finished the installation in one day. House stays so much cooler now.

reviews.name: Jennifer M.
reviews.text: Been using them for maintenance for 2 years. Always on time, thorough inspections, and they caught a potential issue before it became expensive.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE
service_areas.heading: Serving Jacksonville & Surrounding Areas
service_areas.subheading: Fast, reliable HVAC service throughout Northeast Florida

cta.heading: Need HVAC Service Today?
cta.body: Don't wait in the heat. Our licensed technicians are ready with same-day service and upfront pricing.
